name: 1St Cooperative
description_short: 1st Cooperative Federal Credit Union offers member-owned banking services including checking, savings, debit cards, and ATM access across South Carolina and nationwide.
description_long:
1st Cooperative Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative providing traditional banking and financial services to individuals and members. Based on their website, the organization operates as a full-service credit union with physical locations and digital banking capabilities. The institution emphasizes accessibility and member benefits typical of cooperative financial institutions.

1st Cooperative offers online and mobile banking platforms, debit and credit card products (including a Visa Platinum Card), checking and savings accounts, eStatements, and extensive ATM access. Members can utilize 700 surcharge-free ATMs across South Carolina and 30,000 fee-free ATMs nationwide. The credit union provides the CardValet app for debit card controls, allowing members to turn cards on/off, set spending limits, and receive purchase alerts. They also partner with GreenPath Financial Wellness to offer financial counseling services.

The credit union differentiates itself through cooperative ownership structure, regional South Carolina focus with statewide ATM network access, and free digital convenience tools (online banking, mobile app, eStatements, CardValet). Their emphasis on fee reduction through paperless statements and surcharge-free ATM networks reflects member-centric positioning common to credit unions.

While the website demonstrates active operations and modern digital banking capabilities, the limited information provided focuses primarily on account access and card features rather than comprehensive loan products, rates, or membership eligibility requirements. Prospective members would need to contact the institution directly for detailed information about deposit accounts, lending products, interest rates, and membership criteria. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Account access through 700+ South Carolina ATMs
pros: Access to 700 surcharge-free ATMs across South Carolina and 30,000 fee-free ATMs nationwide
Free mobile banking and online banking platforms with modern digital experience
CardValet app allows cardholders to control debit card usage, set limits, and receive alerts at no cost
eStatements reduce fees and provide paperless account access within online banking
Partnership with GreenPath Financial Wellness provides free financial counseling services
Visa Platinum Card with competitive rates available to members
Travel notification feature for credit and debit cards to prevent fraud blocks
cons: Website provides limited information about deposit rates, loan products, or membership eligibility requirements
No details available regarding minimum balance requirements, account fees, or interest rates
Appears to have limited geographic presence (South Carolina-focused) compared to national banks
best_for: South Carolina residents seeking member-owned credit union banking with regional ATM access
Consumers wanting free digital banking tools and mobile app features
Members interested in credit union partnerships for financial wellness counseling
diagnosis: 1st Cooperative is best for South Carolina residents seeking traditional credit union banking with emphasis on digital convenience tools and fee reduction. The primary caveat is that the public website provides limited details on account rates, loan products, fees, and membership requirements—interested consumers need direct contact with the institution for comprehensive product information.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
